title: penstemon glaber var. cyananthus
intro: Penstemon glaber var. cyananthus, also known as the Smooth Beardtongue, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its tubular purple flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon glaber var. cyananthus include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
